final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: product photography, square crop
Primary request: smartwatch placed on a marble surface with a coffee cup and notebook as props, natural side lighting, minimalist business style highlighting product texture
Scene/backdrop: clean marble tabletop surface, soft neutral background, minimal clutter
Subject: smartwatch as hero product, sleek modern design with visible screen detail; coffee cup and notebook as supporting props arranged naturally beside it
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, clean and refined
Composition/framing: slight overhead or eye-level angle, balanced flat-lay or three-quarter view, negative space preserved around product
Lighting/mood: soft natural side light casting gentle shadows, clean and airy, understated business elegance
Color palette: cool marble white and grey tones + warm coffee brown accents + muted notebook neutral
Materials/textures: polished marble surface with subtle veining, matte leather notebook cover, ceramic coffee cup glaze, metal and glass watch casing
Constraints: smartwatch must be the focal point; keep composition uncluttered and minimal
Avoid: artificial studio flash look, cluttered props, plastic textures, watermark
